title: Default Deny Network Policy
description:
## Network Policies

In a zero-trust architecture, you should deny all traffic by default and explicitly allow what is needed.

**Your task:**

Create a NetworkPolicy named `default-deny-all` in the `default` namespace that denies all ingress and egress traffic for all pods in the namespace.

```bash
# Verify your policy:
kubectl get networkpolicy default-deny-all
```

hints.title: Default Deny YAML
hints.body: Use a podSelector with an empty matchLabels `{}` to select all pods, and provide empty lists for ingress and egress.
hints.command:
cat <<EOF | kubectl apply -f -
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  - Egress
EOF

commands.description: Policy applies to all pods (empty podSelector)
